name: frontpeek
description: Official connector for the @fredsvanelli/frontpeek npm package: click an element's "Code" button in your running app to open its source in this editor.

frontPeek.port.markdownDescription: Loopback port the bridge listens on. If you change this, pass the same value to the toolbar via the `bridgePort` prop (`<FrontPeek bridgePort={57420} />`) so it probes the right port. Changing this restarts the bridge.
